<thought>
I am at row 02 column F, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead is row 02 column G, which is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be fatal. To avoid lava, I should turn to face a safe adjacent floor cell. The cell above and below are walls or unsafe paths, but the left cell at row 02 column E is a floor cell. From facing right, turning counter-clockwise will face up, which is not the desired direction toward E; turning clockwise will face down, also not toward E. Since I can only rotate or move forward, I need to first choose a safe rotation that may help navigate around the lava barrier. The safest immediate step is to rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
